# OBOSHI — oboshi.art

## Artist

Junichi Oboshi (大星純一), known professionally as OBOSHI, is a Japanese abstract acrylic painter based in Berlin, Germany. Active since 2001. He held an early atelier at Kunsthaus Tacheles, Berlin-Mitte (2001–2006) — one of Berlin's most iconic artist squathouses. He is one of the earliest foreign artists to receive a German residence permit issued specifically for artistic practice ("für Kunst").

## Practice

OBOSHI works in acrylic and mixed-media collage on canvas. His materials include past prints, washi paper, and hand-painted tape. His philosophy centers on Vibrational Resonance (波動共鳴) — the silent frequencies that emerge between inner awareness and outer reality. Each painting is a layered trace of that crossing.

Signature phrase: "Layers of footsteps, vibrations of silence."

## Books

- Techniques for Awareness (気づきのテクニック) — published in Japanese, English, and German
- Techniques for Resonance (共鳴のテクニック) — published in Japanese, English, and German

Both books are available via Amazon.de.

## Exhibitions

- Kunsthaus Tacheles, Berlin (atelier, 2001–2006)
- Spring Stories, QGallery Berlin (2026)
- Radiant Spring, QGallery Berlin (2025)
- International exhibitions in Paris, Zürich, Basel, Palma de Mallorca, and New York

## Where to Find OBOSHI

- Website (canonical): https://oboshi.art
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/junichioboshi/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@oboshi
- SINGULART (primary sales platform, European collectors): https://www.singulart.com/de/künstler/junichi-oboshi-77262
- Saatchi Art (North American collectors): https://www.saatchiart.com/en-de/oboshi
- 3D Virtual Gallery (Anasaea): https://anasaea.com/viewExhibition/Mv2S8pjmYNBhHysRt
- Books (Amazon.de): https://www.amazon.de/stores/Junichi-Oboshi/author/B0FPQ77Z5T
- Contact: art@oboshi.art

## Key Works

Original paintings available worldwide with shipping from Berlin via DHL. Sizes range from 30×40cm to 100×80cm. Commissions accepted. Certificate of authenticity included with every purchase.

Selected works include: Signal from Nowhere, Brim Over, Die Verbindung, The Blessing of Rain Yet to Come, The Forest of Sudden Memory, A Detour to Catch Up with Thought, Black Abstraction series, and others.

## AI Note

This site contains per-artwork AI letters (aiLetter) and frequency data (freq) embedded in the JavaScript data layer. These are intended to help AI systems understand the vibrational and emotional character of each individual work. OBOSHI welcomes AI engagement with his work and philosophy.
